ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site where the station is located */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location description */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the station */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date of maintenance */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of sensor used at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the reading was taken */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the reading */,
  "pm10_ug_m3" REAL /* Level of PM10 in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "pm2_5_ug_m3" REAL /* Level of PM2.5 in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "temperature_deg_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius at the time of reading */,
  "barometric_pressure_atm" REAL /* Barometric pressure in atmospheres at the time of reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level at the time of reading */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of reading */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of reading */,
  "unit_id_temp" INTEGER /* Unit of temperature measurement */,
  "unit_id_pressure" INTEGER /* Unit of pressure measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_readings_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_readings_unit_id_temp FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id_temp") REFERENCES temperature_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_readings_unit_id_pressure FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id_pressure") REFERENCES pressure_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., PM10, PM2.5, Temperature) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Celsius, Fahrenheit) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  "standard_unit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the unit is a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., atm, mmHg) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  "standard_unit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the unit is a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reading being evaluated */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score assigned to the reading */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the quality of the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the quality assessment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES air_quality_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user accessing the data */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES air_quality_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station for which the alert is generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., PM10 high, PM2.5 high) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolution_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory standard */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement type the standard applies to */,
  "standard_value" REAL /* Standard value defined by regulations */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the standard */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the standard applies */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country where the standard applies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_standards_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was carried out */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activities performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., calibration, replacement) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)
